MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows: PLAINTIFF ALICE WELGE-LUESSEN Re-Notice Of Motion is OFF CALENDAR. There is a notice of appeal in this matter. According to CRC 8.36(A) the motion for substitution must be made in the reviewed Court. Parties have been advised of the Court's inclination to take this matter off calendar by July 9, 2018 tentative ruling. Neither opposition nor reply filed after July 9, 2018 addressed this issue.
